5652.description: Defeat Blue in Viridian City and earn the Earth Badge.

5959.title: A League of Your Own
5959.description: Defeat Red using only a single Pokémon.

199575.description: Catch Entei and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

199583.description: Defeat every non-missable Trainer in Kanto.

199584.description: Collect every visible and hidden field item in Kanto.

199585.title: We're Gonna Give You the Power
199585.description: Return the stolen Machine Part to the staff of the Kanto Power Plant.

199586.title: The Lazy Song
199586.description: Catch the Snorlax in Vermillion City and register it in the Pokédex.

199587.description: Receive a Moon Stone after witnessing the Clefairy ritual at Mt. Moon Square.

199589.title: Serenity Beyond the Storm
199589.description: Catch Lugia and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

199590.title: At the End of the Rainbow
199590.description: Catch Ho-Oh and register it in the Pokédex without using a Master Ball.

199591.title: Ferry Fountain Fridays
199591.description: Catch the Lapras in Union Cave and register it in the Pokédex.

199593.title: The Thief's Last Stand
199593.description: Win the optional battle against your rival at Indigo Plateau.

199596.title: I Slept Like a Log...

199597.description: Add Buena's phone number to your Pokégear after earning 30 Blue Card points.

199600.description: Obtain a Lucky Egg from a wild Chansey by either catching the Pokémon or stealing it.

199601.title: Apri-Cornucopia

199605.title: Attack of the Mad Cow
199605.description: Defeat Whitney in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 20 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon.

199606.title: In the Spirit of Battle
199606.description: Defeat Morty in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 25 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon.

199607.title: Black Belt in Training
199607.description: Defeat Chuck in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 30 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon.

199608.title: Stainless Stealing Victory
199608.description: Defeat Jasmine in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 35 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon.

199609.description: Defeat Pryce in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 31 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon.

199610.description: Defeat Clair in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 40 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199611.description: Defeat the Elite Four and Lance in a single session in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 44 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199612.title: Shock to the System
199612.description: Defeat Lt. Surge in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 46 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199613.title: Telepathic Miscommunications
199613.description: Defeat Sabrina in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 48 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199614.title: Poor, Washed-Up Mermaid
199614.description: Defeat Misty in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 47 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199615.title: Slicing the Blades of Yesterday
199615.description: Defeat Erika in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 46 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199616.description: Defeat Janine in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 39 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries.

199617.title: Frying Up the Egg-Head
199617.description: Defeat Blaine in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 50 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199618.title: Until Next Time... Smell Ya Later!
199618.description: Defeat Blue in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 58 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199619.title: To Train Them Is My Cause
199619.description: Defeat Red in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 65 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon; all Johto Legendaries allowed.

199620.description: Learn a new move from Bill's father outside the Goldenrod City Game Corner.

199621.title: The Anger of a Gentle 'Mon
199621.description: Have your Pokémon in the first slot use Frustration or Return at its maximum power.

199622.description: Win the Bug-Catching Contest at the National Park.

199623.description: Win the Bug-Catching Contest without catching a Butterfree, a Beedrill, a Scyther, or a Pinsir.

199624.title: Earning Style Points
199624.description: Win the Bug-Catching Contest with Cooltrainer Nick as a participant.

199625.title: For That Nice & Shiny Coat
199625.description: Have Daisy Oak comb your Pokémon in Pallet Town.

199626.title: Didn't Know You Had It in You!
199626.description: Deal super effective damage with Hidden Power.

199627.title: Double Dozen Deduction
199627.description: Win a x24 bet in the Card Flip minigame at a Game Corner.

199628.title: Local Competition
199628.description: Clear the Battle Tower using only Johto Pokémon - no Lugia or Ho-Oh.

199629.title: Cute, Soft, & Made with Love
199629.description: Own every Poké Doll purchased by Mom.

199630.title: Worth Its Weight in Mold
199630.description: Get Mania of Cianwood City's permission to keep Shuckie by raising its Friendship high enough.

199631.title: Our Store's Up High, But Our Prices Are Low

199632.title: Gneiss Try, Mr. Jelly Donut!
199632.description: Defeat Brock in the Set battle style using only Johto Pokémon that do not exceed level 44 during battle and without using any Pack items - no external trade-only Pokémon or Legendaries other than the Beasts.

199633.description: Have a Shuckle turn a Berry into Berry Juice after a battle.

199634.title: Megaton Chances
199634.description: See Golem by lining up two 7s on a slot machine at a Game Corner.

199635.title: Underage Gambling Pays Off!
199635.description: Earn a 7-7-7 on a slot machine at a Game Corner.

199636.title: Let the Unown Be Known
199636.description: Solve each of the puzzle chambers and collect every hidden item in the Ruins of Alph.

199637.title: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
199637.description: Defeat every possible Trainer aboard the S.S. Aqua excluding those from the first voyage.

199638.description: Promote the Miracle Cycle bike shop in Goldenrod City and be allowed to keep the bike.

199639.title: The Reel Pokédex
199639.description: Collect all 3 of the fishing rods.

199640.title: This One's For You, Doll
199640.description: Receive a Pass for the Magnet Train from the Copycat in Saffron City.

292714.description: Scare away the ghost observing you in silence

292735.description: Obtain the Gold Carving and figure out how to use it to open the door in the Square Garden

548939.title: The Sorcerer's Pet
548939.description: [Valkyrie] Chase the Queen of the Fairies, face Belial, and live to tell the tale to clear Chapter 1

548940.title: The Crimson Witch
548940.description: [Valkyrie] Explore the Deep Forests of Elrit and confront the forest witch Velvet to clear Chapter 2

548942.description: [Valkyrie] Plow through your father's troops and liberate him from the spirit haunting him to clear Chapter 4

548943.description: [Valkyrie] Blaze through fiery pits and support your husband against Leventhan to clear Chapter 5

548944.description: [Valkyrie] Invade Ringford on your own and get back Titrel to clear Chapter 6

548945.title: Death Denied
548945.description: [Valkyrie] Force yourself through the Netherworld to claim Oswald back from the Queen of the Dead to clear the Epilogue

548946.title: Maybe Find a Moon Pearl

548947.description: [The Pooka Prince] Gain the respect of King Odin by giving a lesson to Lord Brigan to clear Chapter 2

548948.title: Just Who Are You?
548948.description: [The Pooka Prince] Hunt down the impostor through the forest and defeat them to clear Chapter 3

548950.title: Cyrano and Roxane
548950.description: [The Pooka Prince] Interfere in the war raging above ground to save your beloved to clear Chapter 5

548952.title: Rightful Heir
548952.description: [The Pooka Prince] Purge the lawless streets of Titania and free Belial from enslavement to clear the Epilogue

548953.description: [Fairy Land] Hunt some frogs and survive a draconic ambush to clear Chapter 1

548954.description: [Fairy Land] Suppress the rebellion brewing in Ringford and defeat Melvin's goon to clear Chapter 2

548955.title: Earning Some Respect
548955.description: [Fairy Land] Show the might of a maiden to Wagner to clear Chapter 3

548956.description: [Fairy Land] Track down the three wise men, corner Beldor, and have frog deliver them an eternal punishment to clear Chapter 4

548957.description: [Fairy Land] Pull the legendary blacksmith Brom back from the dead to clear Chapter 5

548959.description: [Fairy Land] Rally the troups, engage the forces of Ragnanival, and destroy Odin's Sphere to clear the Epilogue

548960.description: [The Black Sword] Infiltrate Nebulapolis, beat up a drunk fool, and set your eyes on Odin's witch for the first time to clear Chapter 1

548961.title: Cursed Warrrior
548961.description: [The Black Sword] Engage the valkyries and survive an ambush by the Halja to clear Chapter 2

548964.description: [The Black Sword] Go on a hunt and take down yet another dragon to clear Chapter 5

548966.description: [The Black Sword] Face the Inferno King himself and rescue Gwendolyn from the fiery pits of Volkenon to clear the Epilogue

548968.description: [Fate] Sneak into Ringford, snatch Titrel, and leave without a scratch to clear Chapter 2

548989.description: [Armageddon] Fulfill every prophecy and let the revival of the land begin!

273061.description: Hit a combo of 666666 in Freestyle Mode (without hitting an average rate below 70%, return to Main Menu to retry)

273062.title: Lord of Combo
273062.description: After reaching Lv 99 and clearing all 70 missions, hit a combo of 999999 in Freestyle Mode (without hitting an average rate below 70%, return to Main Menu to retry) and earn the 'Lord of Combo' title

273063.title: Barnyardcore
273063.description: In Freestyle Mode, clear 'Taekwonburi' with the Teakwonburi character, Puppy gear and Chick note equipped

273064.title: All That Glitters
273064.description: In Freestyle Mode, clear 'Starfish' with the Katharine character, RubySpinel gear and Jewel note equipped

273065.title: Envious
273065.description: In Freestyle Mode, earn an NB Disc on any 'NB RANGERS' song with the NB RANGER character, NB RANGER gear, and BrokenHeart note equipped
